headline: Intel Stock Falls but Its Foundry Turnaround Is Becoming Reality. Just Ask Cadence.
summary: Intel stock falls amid the broader selloff in chip stocks. However, Intel could benefit from a deal to accelerate its chip-manufacturing revival.

headline: Intel’s Foundry Turnaround Is Becoming Reality. Just Ask Cadence.
summary: FEATURE   Intel stock was rising early Tuesday. A newly expanded deal with Cadence Design Systems looks like a sign of confidence in Intel’s next-generation chip-manufacturing process.  Intel shares were up 2.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Cadence Design Systems, Raises Price Target to $432
summary: Stifel  analyst Ruben Roy   maintains Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) with a Buy and raises the price target from $395 to $432.
